title: ManifestDef
description: A template manifest: which blocks compose a document, in order, with the discriminators that guard family selection. STRUCTURE ONLY. This schema describes the SHAPE of a manifest, not any firm's specific manifests: a published manifest ships the structural wiring; the drafting judgment about which variants and conditions to apply lives in a private pack.

template_id.description: Stable identifier for the template, conventionally '<practice_area>__<document_type>'.

practice_area.description: Practice area the template belongs to (e.g. real_estate, estate_planning, litigation).

document_type.description: The kind of document produced (e.g. warranty_deed, complaint, lease).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the template produces. Structural description only; no client content.

context_defaults.description: Default context values applied to the assembly context (structural defaults / flags, not client values).

required_slots.description: Slot names that must be supplied for the document to be complete. Names only, no values.

paired_forms.description: External forms that must accompany the document (e.g. a transfer-tax declaration). Reference labels only.

blocks.description: Ordered references to the blocks that compose the document. Each entry is assembly wiring (block id + inclusion mode + conditions), NOT clause text.

mode.description: How the block participates in assembly.

when.description: Optional condition (context expression) gating inclusion of the block.

variant_select.description: Ordered rules selecting a block variant by condition. Each rule pairs a 'when' condition with a target 'variant' id.

variant.description: Variant id to select when 'when' holds.

discriminators.description: Named discriminators that guard family selection and enum-check routing inputs. Each discriminator constrains an input value (typically an enum) so a wrong value is rejected rather than producing a false document.

required.description: Whether the discriminator must be supplied.

pin.description: A value the discriminator is pinned to for this template (bakes a fixed choice).

hint.description: Human explanation of the discriminator's effect and routing. Structural guidance only.
